---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    theme: cosmo
    css: ../styles.scss
    smooth-scroll: true
    df-print: paged  # Required only for R-based data frames
---

## Coauthors in alphabetical order

The following table includes the coauthors of ongoing and finished projects. *Indicates undergraduate RA coauthors.*

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
coauthors <- readr::read_csv("coauthors.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::select(Name, Affiliation, Note) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Note = dplyr::coalesce(Note, "")) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Name)

updated_date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
cat("**Total coauthors:**", nrow(coauthors), "(updated", updated_date, ")\n\n")
knitr::kable(coauthors, format = "pipe")
```
